durable_contract.authority_model: exact credential plus ordered live policy proofs and optional AI entitlement
durable_contract.execution_evidence: independent executor lease plus provider evidence when required
durable_contract.request_storage: redacted v2 descriptor plus optional opaque sealed request reference
durable_contract.terminal_storage: typed opaque sealed terminal reference with 15-minute retention
durable_contract.workflow_parent_model: shared protected effect registry, exact parent authority digest, allowlisted target rule
